title: Emma's Big Feelings
synopsis: Emma learns to understand and express her big feelings with help from her loving family, discovering that all emotions are okay to feel.

pages.text: Emma woke up feeling mad. Her toys were everywhere and her favorite teddy bear was missing. She stomped her feet and felt angry inside.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks stands in her messy bedroom surrounded by swirling red angry clouds and jagged lightning shapes representing her mad feelings
illustration.alt: Emma looking upset in a messy room with red swirls showing anger

pages.text: Mama saw Emma's angry face. 'It's okay to feel mad,' Mama said gently. 'Let's take deep breaths together and find your teddy bear.'

illustration.description: Mama kneeling beside Emma who has straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks, with the red angry swirls slowly fading to calmer purple colors as they breathe together
illustration.alt: Mama helping Emma calm down with breathing exercises

pages.text: Later, Emma felt sad when Daddy had to go to work. Big tears rolled down her cheeks. The sadness felt like a heavy cloud in her chest.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks sitting by the window with blue raindrops and storm clouds swirling around her, tears on her face
illustration.alt: Emma crying with blue sad rain clouds around her

pages.text: Daddy gave Emma a big hug. 'I feel sad too when I leave,' he said. 'But I'll be back tonight, and we can read stories together.'

illustration.description: Daddy hugging Emma who has straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks, with the blue storm clouds beginning to part and show glimpses of warmer colors
illustration.alt: Daddy hugging Emma as the sad feelings start to lift

pages.text: At dinner, Emma's whole family was together. She felt happy and loved. Her heart felt warm and bright like sunshine.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks sitting at the dinner table with her family, surrounded by golden yellow sunshine rays and sparkling stars of joy
illustration.alt: Emma smiling with her family surrounded by happy yellow sunshine

pages.text: 'All feelings are okay,' Mama said. 'Mad, sad, happy - they all help us understand ourselves. And we're always here to help you with your big feelings, Emma.'

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks surrounded by a beautiful rainbow of emotion colors - red, blue, and yellow swirling together harmoniously with her family nearby
illustration.alt: Emma with a rainbow of all emotions around her and her loving family

metadata.illustrationStyle: emotion mapped colors, angry red swirls, sad blue rain, happy yellow sunshine, abstract emotion backgrounds, Inside Out inspired, feeling visualization, color psychology

questions.question: What color represents Emma's angry feelings?
questions.explanation: Red swirls showed Emma's mad feelings in the story.

questions.question: What did Mama teach Emma about feelings?
questions.explanation: Mama said all feelings are okay and help us understand ourselves.

questions.question: Why was Emma sad?
questions.explanation: Emma felt sad when Daddy had to go to work.

questions.question: How did Emma's family help her?
questions.explanation: Emma's family gave hugs, comfort, and taught her about feelings.
